author: Sigma Capital

excerpt: To start day trading, gain knowledge, use technical analysis, and manage risks. Start with small investments and set clear price targets and stop-losses. Leverage technology for better insights.

content.introduction: To start day trading, gain knowledge, use technical analysis, and manage risks. Start with small investments and set clear price targets and stop-losses. Leverage technology for better insights.
body: As a beginner, focus on a maximum of one to two stocks during a session. Tracking and finding opportunities is easier with just a few stocks.
